title: The Digital Dollar & Unit T-122 on First Contact
fullTitle: August 20, 2022 — The Digital Dollar & Unit T-122 on First Contact
source: Session transcript (reconstructed from photographed pages of the transcription documents; see the transcription note)
contentNote: Transcription note: this transcript was reconstructed from photographed pages of the community's typed transcription documents; no recording has been located. The first five pages are chained by overlapping text; the final two pages follow by conversational flow. The session includes dated predictions (a 2023 digital-dollar bill, first contact in 2024) and claims that elections are externally controlled — preserved as spoken, not endorsed.
